xray.resourcepolicy.CfnAbout: Use `AWS::XRay::ResourcePolicy` to specify an X-Ray resource-based policy, which grants one or more AWS services and accounts permissions to access X-Ray. Each resource-based policy is associated with a specific AWS account.

xray.resourcepolicy.BypassPolicyLockoutC.Description: A flag to indicate whether to bypass the resource-based policy lockout safety check.

xray.resourcepolicy.PolicyDocument.Description: The resource-based policy document, which can be up to 5kb in size.

xray.resourcepolicy.PolicyName.Description: The name of the resource-based policy. Must be unique within a specific AWS account.
